title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Cancel
scenario: Cancel button on Login dialog returns user to Account screen with Login and Share Data buttons still visible in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app as a guest user.
2. Tap the hamburger menu (App Settings icon) to open the side navigation.
6. Tap Cancel on the login dialog.
expected: Login dialog closes, user returns to the Account screen, and the Log in and Share Data buttons remain visible.
